node.text: Driven by the lack of representation, @melissarbutler became the change she wanted to see in the beauty industry. Her inclusive brand started in her kitchen & now we’re proud to carry @thelipbar on our shelves. #BlackAndUnlimited

node.text: Moms always say, “don’t get me anything,” but WE know better. Treat her to a gift so pampering, she’ll forget about the time you cut your bangs.☝🏿💙 #MothersDay #WalmartBeauty

node.text:
Get ready for @vanleeuwenicecream to drop seven new flavors exclusively at Walmart soon! 

(No, Walmart is not a flavor in the seven 😉)

node.text: Bring your space to life with a pop of color and pattern with the @Temi.Coker x Walmart home collection! Shop exclusive rugs, vases, pillows and throws inspired by Temi’s heritage and journey from Lagos, Nigeria to Dallas, Texas - only at Walmart. Shop now at the link in bio!
